objective: Heal the injured farmer; demonstrate the cost of action
opposition: The injury's severity outstrips Vel's budget
turn: The healing succeeds but costs two levels more than planned
consequence_cost: Vel drops to 31; her margin for the journey shrinks

objective: Assess readiness for the journey to zero
opposition: Vel's own doubts and depleted resources
turn: She cannot afford to wait — each job drains her closer to a level where the crossing becomes impossible
consequence_cost: She commits to leaving now

objective: Identify and locate a high-level spender willing to fall
opposition: The rarity of Hoarded defectors
turn: She hears about Kem Aldraste walking out of the Vault
consequence_cost: She has a target and heads north

objective: Endure the Conservatory Rite without breaking
opposition: Social pressure; family expectation; his father's visible deterioration
turn: Kem sees his father's empty eyes and cannot stay still any longer
consequence_cost: He stands up mid-rite — the break is public and irreversible

objective: Leave the Vault using abilities for the first time
opposition: Guards; the Vault's physical barriers; his own inexperience
turn: His Projection Shield is absurdly overpowered for opening a door
consequence_cost: He's out; the court is horrified; 10 levels spent in minutes

objective: Survive first hours outside the Vault
opposition: Basic survival requirements he has never faced
turn: His Sustenance Charm produces food for forty because he cannot calibrate
consequence_cost: Free, lost, and burning levels on trivial problems

objective: Assess whether Kem is useful as a cascade partner
opposition: Vel's disgust at his wastefulness and ignorance
turn: Kem has the levels she needs and a genuine desire to reach zero
consequence_cost: She proposes the alliance despite her contempt

objective: Negotiate terms of the partnership
opposition: Mutual distrust; Kem's demand for information; Vel's secrecy
turn: Terms agreed: she guides, he follows, she controls when information is shared
consequence_cost: Alliance formed; Vel conceals the mechanism's requirements

objective: Evade Hoarded outriders on their trail
opposition: Outriders at level 295 with minimal enforcement training
turn: Detection; evasion fails
consequence_cost: Fight begins — first real combat

objective: Survive first real combat as a team
opposition: Outriders' raw power; Kem's total lack of combat experience
turn: Kem is absurdly powerful and absurdly wasteful; Vel is surgical
consequence_cost: Outriders defeated; Kem drops 41 levels, Vel spends 3

objective: Regroup after the fight
opposition: Vel's fury at the waste vs. Kem's exhilaration
turn: Kem is grinning despite the cost — he has never felt alive before
consequence_cost: Pursuit confirmed; they need to move smart

objective: Make camp and teach Kem basic survival without abilities
opposition: Kem's aristocratic helplessness and physical incompetence
turn: Dark comedy of privilege meeting practice; Kem is terrible but earnest
consequence_cost: Vel's contempt begins shifting toward something warmer

objective: Exchange personal histories over evening fire
opposition: Vel's secrecy about zero; Kem's need to understand her
turn: Vel shares her origin (the drowning girl); Kem shares his truth about his father
consequence_cost: Real trust established; both become people to each other

objective: Accept and understand the retrieval assignment
opposition: Sable's lack of field experience; the assignment's absurdity
turn: The Council cannot deploy the Red Reserve without admitting inaction philosophy is insufficient
consequence_cost: Sable accepts the impossible assignment

objective: Assemble and orient a pursuit team
opposition: Five untrained level-300 agents who have never been in a field
turn: The orientation is institutional absurdity at peak: protocols from desk-bound authors, equipment none can use
consequence_cost: The most powerful, least competent tracking force ever assembled

objective: Leave the capital for the first time using an ability
opposition: The psychological barrier of her first spend
turn: Sable activates a Wayfinder and experiences directed ability use for the first time
consequence_cost: Sable at 298; the feeling is violation, release, and something she cannot name

objective: Enter the Spent Towns and resupply
opposition: Suspicion of outsiders; culture shock for Kem
turn: The Spent Towns are functional and more alive than anything in the Vault
consequence_cost: Kem's worldview directly challenged

objective: Hire Dren as a guide through the southern routes
opposition: Dren's reluctance and the risk to his family's stability
turn: Dren agrees for payment that could cover his daughter's healing
consequence_cost: They have a guide with his own economic stakes

objective: Detect and evade Sable's approaching team
opposition: Five level-300 agents approaching from the north
turn: Detection fails; the agents arrive before they can move
consequence_cost: Combat is unavoidable

objective: Survive the fight against untrained but powerful agents
opposition: Raw level-300 ability power causing environmental destruction
turn: The fight shifts from comic (agent fuses to boulder) to dangerous (Vel cracks ribs from a glancing hit)
consequence_cost: Vel burns 4 levels; Kem burns 42; Dren takes silo shrapnel

objective: Escape the disorganized agents
opposition: Pursuit by disoriented but recovering agents
turn: Sable watches and learns rather than engaging directly
consequence_cost: They escape diminished; Sable has begun studying combat

objective: Tend Dren's wound without abilities; take stock of transformation
opposition: Kem's lack of medical skill; the emotional weight of his level descent
turn: Kem performs ugly but functional field medicine — his first competent non-ability act
consequence_cost: Kem is changing from liability to partner

objective: Learn about level zero as a threshold
opposition: Vel's habitual secrecy; the concept's strangeness
turn: Vel reveals zero is a threshold to a world without the Ledger
consequence_cost: The journey gains a metaphysical destination

objective: Reach Thessa's settlement and request route information
opposition: Thessa's hostility; twelve years of silence
turn: Thessa is not happy to see Vel; history erupts beneath the surface
consequence_cost: The spoken confrontation begins

objective: Navigate the confrontation between Vel and Thessa
opposition: Thessa's Hoarded deal; Vel's guilt and stubbornness
turn: Thessa gives partial route info but has been compromised by Hoarded representatives
consequence_cost: Trust between Vel and Thessa shattered; partial route obtained

objective: Flee before Hoarded representatives arrive
opposition: Hoarded presence closing in; emotional wreckage
turn: Vel spends one level on Concealment; they leave without resolution
consequence_cost: Vel is shaken; the route to the Margins is partially mapped

objective: Cross a river without using abilities
opposition: The river's physical danger; Kem's instinct to spend
turn: Kem fights the river for two hours and crosses by brute physical effort
consequence_cost: Kem learns that experience outlasts abilities

objective: Report to Lady Aldraste; confront shifting loyalty
opposition: Sable's duty vs. her growing identification with Kem's choice
turn: Sable withholds information about her own transformation from Lady Aldraste
consequence_cost: The pursuit's institutional foundation cracks

objective: Cross the Margins and witness the human cost of Hoarded exploitation
opposition: Depleted communities; distrust of Kem's Hoarded identity
turn: The Margins are full of people ground down by the system that preserved Kem
consequence_cost: Vel's romanticism about spending complicated; Kem confronts his family's legacy

objective: Learn about the threshold's geography from Fallow
opposition: Fallow's bitterness; their unsentimental view of zero
turn: Fallow describes the Scour — where people at zero vanish — as a geographic fact, not a mystery
consequence_cost: The route to the threshold is concrete; zero is real to the Margins as disappearance, not destination

objective: Register the symbolic moment of matching Vel's starting level
opposition: The psychological weight of sustained depletion
turn: Kem hits 31 and understands what Vel has lived with for forty years
consequence_cost: Empathy deepens despite growing tension

objective: Learn the cascade mechanism's requirements
opposition: The mechanism's specificity; Vel's concealment
turn: Vel explains co-spending cascade; Kem realizes she planned for a high-level partner all along
consequence_cost: Vel's manipulation exposed

objective: Confront Vel about using him
opposition: Kem's cold anger; Vel's inability to answer immediately
turn: Kem asks if anything was real; Vel's delay in answering is its own answer
consequence_cost: Alliance fractured but intact — they cannot survive alone at these levels

objective: Arrive alone in the Margins after sending the team back
opposition: Sable's isolation and identity crisis
turn: She finds them — alone, at 240, transformed by six weeks of spending
consequence_cost: The dynamic shifts from institutional pursuit to personal confrontation

objective: Confront all three characters' changed motivations
opposition: Competing needs: Sable's duty, Kem's broken trust, Vel's urgency
turn: Kem tells Sable about the Stillness; Sable recognizes it from other Hoarded she has known
consequence_cost: Sable cannot bring herself to return Kem to the system that produces Stillness

objective: Resolve the pursuit and deliver the Red Reserve warning
opposition: The consequences of Sable's choice; the escalation ahead
turn: Sable departs after warning them: the Council has authorized the Red Reserve
consequence_cost: Pursuit changes form; trained spenders are coming

objective: Say goodbye to Dren; confront the weight of nearness to zero
opposition: Dren's departure; the silence between Vel and Kem since Ch 13
turn: Dren leaves — his reasons are real and his absence is felt
consequence_cost: The group shrinks to two; Kem demands the truth

objective: Tell Kem about Maren and the real reason for reaching zero
opposition: Vel's grief; her resistance to vulnerability
turn: Vel tells the Maren story in pieces — love, co-spending, the threshold, the loss
consequence_cost: The emotional core lands; Kem chooses to continue for understanding plus his own reasons

objective: Approach the Scour and assess the Red Reserve positions
opposition: Reserve operatives at the basin's navigable descent; Vel at 14, Kem at 12
turn: The Reserve agents are positioned at the only clear path; direct approach is impossible
consequence_cost: They need an alternative route through the collapsed tunnel

objective: Navigate the collapsed mining tunnel to reach the basin floor
opposition: Structural danger; their depleted abilities
turn: Kem spends 3 levels on light and reinforcement; Vel spends 1 on Perception mapping
consequence_cost: They reach the basin floor but are further depleted

objective: Reach the basin floor and begin the final approach
opposition: The Reserve detects them; open ground with nowhere to hide
turn: They emerge and are spotted; the final confrontation is unavoidable
consequence_cost: The approach to the threshold begins under fire

objective: Face the Red Reserve in direct combat
opposition: Two trained spenders at 265 and 258; Vel at 8, Kem at 9
turn: Unlike earlier fights, these agents are precise and skilled
consequence_cost: The power differential is staggering; survival requires everything

objective: Fight at near-zero using experience over stats
opposition: Trained agents with overwhelming power
turn: Vel's planned combinations maximize effect; Kem executes three critical spends
consequence_cost: Vel reaches zero; the cascade mechanism activates; the threshold opens

objective: Cross the threshold
opposition: The mechanism's instability; the Reserve recovering
turn: Sable arrives and contributes a cascade burst; Kem spends his last two points
consequence_cost: Both cross the threshold; Sable remains above

objective: Wake in the sub-Ledger; experience a world without the Ledger
opposition: Disorientation; the strangeness of stat-less existence
turn: The sub-Ledger is real — a civilization built by spent-down people over centuries
consequence_cost: Kem encounters a functional world that operates entirely without power

objective: Find Vel and witness the reunion with Maren; face the future
opposition: The complexity of reunion; the threat from above
turn: Vel found Maren; the reunion is imperfect and real; the Hoarded now know about the threshold
consequence_cost: Book 1 resolves personally and opens the saga question
